name: Steamed Haricots Verts and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound small white potatoes, cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large steamer set over boiling water, layer the potato slices and trimmed haricot vert beans.
2. Cover and steam until the potatoes are tender, about 8 minutes.
3. Season the vegetables with salt and pepper.
Notes: This recipe was created to accompany Broiled Salmon with Curried Eggplant Cutney. It can be prepared in 45 minutes or less. Each serving is about 100 calories and contains 0 grams of fat (0% calories from fat).
